h8c49f544gaa4dg4ec7ga624g7e10b8fda4a2: Rotting - he's rotting. Already turning green... Sweet and juicy, all for me. All for me.
hda3f30a7ga9f7g45afgb2e1g100a0ae479c2: Let this one be! My prisoner, drow, not yours. Not this one. I am hungry... starving...
h7d3d1497ge55eg4235gad9egf95b971cc8f5: Let me kill - let me eat him. Nice, red red prisoner, full of meat. Let me eat - I am hungry, so hungry.
h82329110g9752g410egaabbg9ad95dabc9a2: *The rat's nose twitches impatiently. Her teeth bite air as though it is flesh, but it doesn't sate her hunger.*
